label: Hair
description: Defines a hair style for humanlike pawns. All schema fields are inherited from StyleItemDef.

basic-hair.label: Basic hair
basic-hair.description: Hair style with a texture, gender restriction, category, and style tags.

no-graphic-hair.label: No-graphic hair
no-graphic-hair.description: Hair style with no texture, used for styles that suppress the hair slot entirely (e.g., ghoul hair).
